creator: des@FreeBSD.org
text: That's not enough information to work on.  Did you enable the local_unbound service?  Did it create a configuration file on first start?  What did /etc/resolv.conf look like before it started, and what does it look like now?  What does /var/unbound/forward.conf look like?  Do you get an error message when Unbound starts?  What other symptoms did you observe?
